scripts.dev: npm run dev-frontend & npm run dev-backend
scripts.install-all: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend && npm run install-backend-dev
scripts.uninstall-backend: cd servers/backend && pip3 uninstall -r requirements.txt -y && pip3 uninstall -r requirements-dev.txt -y
scripts.uninstall-all: npm run uninstall-frontend && npm run uninstall-backend && npm run uninstall-backend-dev
